description: NACA 0012 in air using Ladson tripped force data at Reynolds ~6.0e6

source.name: Ladson force data via Turbulence Modeling Resource
source.notes: Reference CSV is transcribed from the 120-grit tripped dataset in CLCD_Ladson_expdata.dat, which TMR attributes to NASA TM-4074 (Ladson, 1988).
